{{Quote|Troopers: Find, fix, finish!|Valiant|<ref name="Labyrinth">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>}}
'''Valiant''' was an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] who held the rank of [[Clone Commander/Legends|commander]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the war's final [[Standard day/Legends|days]], the Clone Commander was stationed on the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he was assigned to a task force of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Jedi General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].

==Biography==
In [[Hunt for Darth Sidious|the hunt for Darth Sidious]], he led the commandos of [[Aurek Team]] and [[Bacta Team]]. He and his teams accompanied [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] during their search for Sidious in the [[LiMerge Building/Legends|LiMerge Building]] in [[The Works/Legends|The Works]]. Their search led to the lower levels of [[500 Republica/Legends|''500 Republica'']], where Valiant remained as the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|invasion of Coruscant]] began.

There, they discovered Sidious. He and [[Aurek Team]] were killed beneath ''500 Republica'' by [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] armed with [[Geonosian sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blasters]] and droids armed with blasters, guarding the Sith Lord. The Sith Lord also used the Force against Aurek Team.
